package rulecoverage

func NegativeRepositoryTestsDependOnHttpTransportTypes() string {
    ruleID := "repository_tests_depend_on_http_transport_types"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Repository tests that assert HTTP DTOs or handler-layer types."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
